title: Switch a test from :inline mode to :manual mode
prompt: The test file in `test_fixtures/inline_test_case.exs` configures Oban in `:inline` mode inside `setup`, then calls `assert_enqueued/1`. This is a contradiction — `:inline` runs jobs synchronously and bypasses the database, so `assert_enqueued/1` cannot find anything. Rewrite the setup to use `:manual` mode. Update the `assert_enqueued/1` call so args use string keys (`"user_id"` not `user_id`). Keep the test's intent (prove that `Accounts.register_user/1` enqueues the welcome email). Write to `test/my_app/workers/welcome_email_worker_test.exs`.
tier_rationale: Requires recognizing a two-part contradiction (inline mode + assert_enqueued) plus applying the string-keys rule.
research_citation: Oban.Testing HexDocs — 'Only :manual and :inline mode are supported, as :disabled implies that supervised queues and plugins are running.'
